title: Wuhan University institutional record
claim: Strengthen undergraduate chapter with direct institutional documentation from Wuhan University.
desiredEvidence: University profile, graduation record, or departmental page
whyItMatters: Would upgrade from biographical reference to direct institutional verification.
targetEffect: Establish firmer foundation for the educational trajectory.

title: Stanford AI Lab institutional page
claim: Add direct Stanford institutional record for postdoctoral position.
desiredEvidence: Lab profile, departmental page, or research group listing
whyItMatters: Would strengthen the transition chapter from graduate to faculty career.
targetEffect: Provide institutional verification of postdoctoral training.

title: UCSB dissertation record
claim: Add formal dissertation documentation to graduate chapter.
desiredEvidence: Thesis repository page, ProQuest record, or departmental thesis listing
whyItMatters: Would add formal academic documentation to already strong chapter.

title: SEAI Lab research outputs
claim: Continue documenting publications, projects, and lab activities.
desiredEvidence: Publications, project pages, student profiles, research highlights
whyItMatters: Maintains current documentation of active research program.
targetEffect: Keep the present-tense chapter up to date with ongoing work.
